utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 of these items appear. Each item includes details matching the required specification: type/coverage and corresponding costs in EUR. Health coverage includes both physical and mental health details with costs; property coverage specifies home/contents insurance with costs; travel coverage includes travel insurance with costs; additional_services outlines enhancement services with costs; and total_budget provides a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Therefore, all items are fully specified with appropriate details.
